type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Toluene decreases due to an improvement in the collection efficiency of the landfill gas collection system at the facility (more gas collected, lower fugitive releases of VOCs, including toluene)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: CO emissions decrease due to a change in the proportion of landfill gas combusted in the flares relative to the landfill gas-to-energy engines (flare emit more CO per cubic metre of methane combusted, based on AP-42 emission factors), fugitive releases decreased due to an increased collection efficiency for landfill gas from the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: significant changes are recorded in PM, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions.  These are due to a large decrease in VKT on-site, resulting in a total vkt less than the 10,000 kilometer per year reporting threshold, therefore, the contribution from road dust was not include in the 2015 reported quantities of particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: significant changes are recorded in PM, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions.  These are due to a large decrease in VKT on-site, resulting in a total vkt less than the 10,000 kilometer per year reporting threshold, therefore, the contribution from road dust was not include in the 2015 reported quantities of particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: significant changes are recorded in PM, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions.  These are due to a large decrease in VKT on-site, resulting in a total vkt less than the 10,000 kilometer per year reporting threshold, therefore, the contribution from road dust was not include in the 2015 reported quantities of particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: CO emissions decrease in 2014 as there is 14% less LFG sent to flare and 2% less LFG sent to the LGTE Engine in comparison to 2013.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There were significant changes (i.e. 43% decrease) recorded in PM emissions.  These are due to a large 79% decrease in VKT on-site, decrease in surface area of stockpiles (8% decrease) and 33% increase in material handled on-site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There were significant changes (i.e. 24% decrease) recorded in PM10 emissions.  These are due to a large 79% decrease in VKT on-site, decrease in surface area of stockpiles (8% decrease) and 33% increase in material handled on-site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased due to a change in methodology where landfill gas flow was split between Flare and LGTE.  Emission factors for flared gas remained the same, however the IC Engine emission factor was used for the LGTE portion. This update is to reflect current stationary combustion operations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Decreased due to a decrease in the number of round trips on unpaved roads.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased due to a change in methodology where landfill gas flow was split between Flare and LGTE.  Emission factors for flared gas remained the same, however the IC Engine emission factor was used for the LGTE portion. This update is to reflect current stationary combustion operations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased due to a change in methodology where landfill gas flow was split between Flare and LGTE.  Emission factors for flared gas remained the same, however the IC Engine emission factor was used for the LGTE portion. This update is to reflect current stationary combustion operations.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported amount of toluene decreased in 2012 relative to 2011 as fewer emissions were emitted from the landfill in 2012, as the gas collection system efficiency increased from 90% to 95%.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported PM releases increased as a result of increased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2012, which increases the particulate matter from re-entrained road dust.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported PM10 releases increased as a result of increased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2012, which increases the particulate matter from re-entrained road dust.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported PM2.5 releases increased as a result of increased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2012, which increases the particulate matter from re-entrained road dust.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased amount of landfill gas combusted in the landfill gas flare resulted in increased NO2 emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased amount of landfill gas combusted in the landfill gas flare resulted in increased CO emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM emissions decreased in 2011 relative to 2010, as a resulf of a decreased numner of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved road and decrease in erosion and material handling in 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported releases of PM10 decreased in 2011 relative to 2010.  This decrease was the result of a decreased number of vehicle-kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility and decrease in erosion and material handling in 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The reported releases of PM2.5 increased in 2011 relative to 2010.  This increase was a result of an increased amount of landfill gas combusted at the facility in 2011.
